name: Presidio Property Trust, Inc.
summary: Presidio Property Trust, Inc. (SQFT) is an internally-managed REIT incorporated in Maryland, publicly traded on Nasdaq. The Company owns commercial office and industrial properties located in Colorado, North Dakota, California, Maryland, and Texas, serving approximately 131 commercial tenants. It also acquires model homes from homebuilders in sale-leaseback triple-net transactions through its PPT Model Homes subsidiary, operating across Alabama, Texas, Tennessee, and Arizona.
